title: The house on the marsh
author: Warden, Florence, 1857-1929

quoteLast: when the execution took place, and the black flag was immediately hoisted from the prison tower as an indication to the crowd outside that all was over.
title: Charles Peace, or The Adventures of a Notorious Burglar
author: Anonymous

quoteLast: by Pee-wee’s reliable scout watch, and just as he was starting with his cousin Prudence for the church lecture hall, he was conscious of a shivering and decided to return and get his scout jacket.
title: Pee-wee Harris in camp
author: Fitzhugh, Percy Keese, 1876-1950; Barbour, Harold S., 1889-1961 [Illustrator]
